query:
SELECT eal.id, eal.alunoId, a.name, eal.tipoAlerta, eal.emailEnviado, eal.createdAt 
FROM email_alertas_log eal 
JOIN alunos a ON a.id = eal.alunoId 
WHERE eal.alunoId IN (30055, 30064) 
ORDER BY eal.createdAt DESC;
command:
